title: Q Letter Balloon Pastel Pink, 40 Inch Alphabet Foil Word Balloons, Big Inflatable Light Baby Pink Balloon Letter Q, XXL Helium Custom Letter Balloons for Girl Birthday Party Decoration Supplies
features: 🎈 What You Will Get: Our giant letter balloon package includes 1pc 40 inch "Q" letter foil pastel pink balloon and 1pc convenient straw for inflate. You can choose any big alphabet balloon to combine and customize the word you want to form. For example: OH BABY, BRIDE, GIRL, BIG SIS. Make your party more unique and meaningful.

After the aeration is complete, do not forget to press the inflation port to prevent air leakage.

🎈 Easy to Use: The pearl pink alphabet balloon has holes at the top and bottom, so you can hang it in the air with a string. After use, a long straw can be inserted into the filling hole and gently pressed to deflate, and then folded up for the next use. 🎈 Trust Us: We hope that every customer can have a satisfying and unforgettable party, customer satisfaction is our aim. If you have any questions or suggestions for our pastel pink letter mylar balloons, please contact us, we are happy to help you and reply to you within 24 hours.
description: Every party needs its own character, and to make yours unique, you can customize a combination of pink foil balloons words or phrases for your party, as listed below: ONE / GIRL / I Love You / Happy Birthday / Happy New Year / OH Baby Specifications: ✨ Size: 40 Inch ✨ Package Include: 1pc "Q" Letter Balloon & 1pc Straw ✨ Color: Pastel Pink ✨ Material: Foil ✨ Great for: birthday party / wedding / baby shower / outdoor / indoor / home / celebration / cheer / bridal shower / anniversary / graduation / class and school activities / senior picture day / amazing photo prop and other decoration. How to Inflate the Mylar Balloons: ❣️ At first find the infation port. ❣️ Use a gas pump or straw to slowly inflate the balloon until it is 90% full. ❣️ After filling, press the self-sealing mouth to prevent air leakage. How To Deflate: ❣️ Insert the long straw into theself-sealing valve. ❣️ If feeling the gas coming out, then gently press the balloon with your hand. ❣️ Until all the gas has been released, fold the balloon and put it away for next use. Warm Reminder: 💥 Due to the thermal expansion and contraction characteristics of aluminum foil, please avoid filling it with more than 90% air or helium. If over-inflated, it can easily cause the letter B balloon to explode at high temperatures. 💨 Please avoid placing the birthday balloons in an outdoor high temperature environment for a long time. If the ambient temperature is too low, it will also cause the balloon to deflate. ⚠ If there are 2 layers of aluminum foil alphabet balloon sticky situation, must stop inflating, separate the 2 layer of balloons and then inflated, or easy to damage. If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us!
